headline: The White House lifted export controls on Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 after a two-week freeze on the company's most advanced models.
body: The Department of Commerce reversed restrictions that had blocked deployment of Anthropic's frontier models, and Anthropic said it would restore access to Fable and Mythos beginning the following day. New model releases accompanied the policy shift, with Sonnet 5 shipping and Fable 5 slated to follow. On the research side, technique-level activity dominated the rotation: trajectory data, Gradient Staleness, agent skills, behavioral auditing, and ablation all broke out, with masking, game loop, and spec-driven development entering as new outliers.

cited_items.title: White House drops restrictions on Anthropic AI models after two-week ban - The Washington Post
Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
US lifts curbs on Anthropic's Fable, Mythos AI models
WhiteHouse lifts export control on Anthropic that froze its most advanced models
Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
